body.content:
{"title":"# Daily AI Info (1/2)","elements":[[{"tag":"text","text":"News"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"要闻"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"1. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.5 Instant，ChatGPT 增强记忆功能"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenAI 宣布向所有 ChatGPT 用户推出 GPT-5.5 Instant 作为新默认模型。它在提升智能与图像分析能力的同时大幅减少幻觉，写作风格也更简洁直白。 ChatGPT 还增强了记忆功能的效果，并上线了记忆源功能。用户可直接查看和管理个性化回复的具体上下文来源。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-5-instant/","text":"https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-5-instant/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"模型发布"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"2. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google DeepMind 为 Gemma 4 系列模型开源了 MTP drafter"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google DeepMind 为 Gemma 4 系列模型开源了 MTP drafter 。 它通过推测解码和共享 KV cache ，能够并行预测多个 token。 这一技术在不降低输出质量的前提下，将推理速度最高提升至原来的 3 倍。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/multi-token-prediction-gemma-4/","text":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/multi-token-prediction-gemma-4/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"3. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Subquadratic 推出 SubQ，上下文窗口达 1200 万 token"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Subquadratic 公司宣布推出基于 Subquadratic Sparse Attention 架构的大语言模型 SubQ 。 该模型具备 1200万 token 上下文窗口，在百万 token 任务中实现最高 52 倍预填充加速。 现已开放早期访问，提供 API 与编码 Agent 两种使用方式。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://subq.ai/how-ssa-makes-long-context-practical","text":"https://subq.ai/how-ssa-makes-long-context-practical"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"4. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Inworld AI 发布 Realtime TTS-2，支持跨语言实时对话"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Inworld AI 发布了新一代实时对话语音模型 Realtime TTS-2 。 该模型能听取完整对话音频，提供对话感知等核心能力。 它支持在超 100 种语言中维持同一音色。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://inworld.ai/blog/realtime-tts-2","text":"https://inworld.ai/blog/realtime-tts-2"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"5. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Luma 开放 UNI-1.1 系列模型 API，Image Arena 排名全球实验室第三"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Luma 正式开放 UNI-1.1 与 UNI-1.1-Max 的 API。 相关模型采用 decoder-only 自动回归 transformer 架构。 在 Arena.ai 评测中， Luma 凭借该系列模型位列全球实验室第三名。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://lumalabs.ai/news/uni-1-1-api","text":"https://lumalabs.ai/news/uni-1-1-api"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"开发生态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"6. "},{"tag":"text","text":"AI Studio 更新 Build 模块，集成 Nano Banana 与编辑模式"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google AI Studio 的 Vibe Coding 功能正式上线了编辑模式，并集成了 Nano Banana 图像生成能力。 用户可以直接在界面上进行批注、快速编辑组件。 在生成应用时，系统将自动创建并替换自定义图像资产。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/GoogleAIStudio/status/2051679127824998762","text":"https://x.com/GoogleAIStudio/status/2051679127824998762"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"7. "},{"tag":"text","text":"字节跳动 TRAE 上线 SOLO 移动端，支持跨设备协同"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
字节跳动 旗下 AI 编程产品" TRAE SOLO "移动端现已正式上线，支持跨设备同步与手机端向电脑派发任务。 同时，官方联合 星巴克 推出限时咖啡兑换活动。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/g0hMDh5PPQWbp_HmXePi0A","text":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/g0hMDh5PPQWbp_HmXePi0A"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"8. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Augment Code 发布 Augment Cosmos 公开预览"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Augment Code 宣布推出 Augment Cosmos 公开预览版。 该产品支持多模型运行，通过引入 Prism 路由技术与专业 Agent，让人类在软件开发生命周期中专注关键节点引导。 现已向 Max 计划用户开放。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://www.augmentcode.com/product/cosmos","text":"https://www.augmentcode.com/product/cosmos"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"9. "},{"tag":"text","text":"谷歌更新 Gemini API 文件搜索，支持多模态检索与精确引用"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 宣布更新 Gemini API 的 File Search 工具。该工具现支持基于 Gemini Embedding 2 的图文跨模态检索、自定义元数据过滤和精确到页码的引用功能。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/expanded-gemini-api-file-search-multimodal-rag","text":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/expanded-gemini-api-file-search-multimodal-rag"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"10. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenClaw 发布 2026.5.4 版，优化启动插件，传将发长期支持版"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenClaw 发布了 2026.5.4 版本，重点优化了插件安装体验与 Gateway 启动速度。此次更新同时修复了 Windows 和 Discord 的稳定性问题。 此外，官方计划在 五月下旬 推出 StableClaw 长期支持版本。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://openclaw.ai/blog/openclaw-rough-week","text":"https://openclaw.ai/blog/openclaw-rough-week"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"产品应用"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"11. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Claude 推出系列金融 Agent 模板，多家机构已落地采用"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Claude 面向金融行业推出投行推介、月终结账及 KYC 筛查等预构建 Agent 模板。 这些模板内嵌连接器与子 Agent ，可作为插件安装到 Claude Cowork 或 Claude Code 。 用户也能在 Managed Agents 中直接投产运行。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://claude.com/solutions/financial-services","text":"https://claude.com/solutions/financial-services"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"12. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google NotebookLM 更新 Mind Maps，移动端开发计划确认"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
NotebookLM 的 Mind Maps 功能已推送重大更新。 用户现在能通过输入提示词来定制生成思维导图，还能即时重命名与分享导图，节点导航动画也变得更加丝滑。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/NotebookLM/status/2051715594697977870","text":"https://x.com/NotebookLM/status/2051715594697977870"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"13. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google Finance 推出 AI 关键瞬间功能解析股价波动"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google Finance 的 beta 版上线了AI驱动的“关键瞬间”功能。 用户查看一个月及以上的股票走势图时，AI会自动标记并解释股价波动原因。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"http://finance.google.com/beta","text":"http://finance.google.com/beta"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"14. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google 推出 Pomelli Catalog，免费向全球用户开放体验"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 为 Pomelli 项目推出了免费的 Pomelli Catalog 新功能。 全球用户只需在官网添加并编辑产品或服务信息，该 Agent 就会基于品牌 DNA 自动生成产品集合。 系统将持续产出个性化的营销活动与摄影棚级高质量图片。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/joshwoodward/status/2051698440690889108","text":"https://x.com/joshwoodward/status/2051698440690889108"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"技术与洞察"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"15. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenAI 重构 WebRTC，实现语音 AI 低延迟传输"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
为了让 语音AI 跟上自然语速， OpenAI 发文介绍其重建了 WebRTC 堆栈。 引入薄中继与有状态收发器架构，为 ChatGPT 语音和 Realtime API 实现了大规模低延迟的实时媒体传输。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://openai.com/index/delivering-low-latency-voice-ai-at-scale/","text":"https://openai.com/index/delivering-low-latency-voice-ai-at-scale/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"16. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenRouter 分析 GPT-5.5 涨价，用户成本增 49% 至 92%。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenRouter 发布成本分析指出，由于 token 价格翻倍，用户从 GPT-5.4 切换到 GPT-5.5 后，实际支出成本大幅增加了 49% 到 92% 。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://openrouter.ai/announcements/gpt55-cost-analysis","text":"https://openrouter.ai/announcements/gpt55-cost-analysis"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"行业动态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"17. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenAI 升级 ChatGPT 广告，开放自助管理及 CPC 竞价"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenAI 宣布扩展 ChatGPT 广告功能，面向美国广告主推出测试版自助 Ads Manager ，并新增单次点击付费的 CPC 竞价模式。 平台还上线了 Conversions API 等工具，在保障对话隐私的前提下提供聚合转化洞察。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://openai.com/index/new-ways-to-buy-chatgpt-ads/","text":"https://openai.com/index/new-ways-to-buy-chatgpt-ads/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"18. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenAI 与普华永道合作，以 AI Agent 重构财务职能"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenAI 与 普华永道 合作，帮企业 CFO 利用 AI Agent 自动化财务工作流并强化风控。 双方已在 OpenAI 内部验证，通过 Codex 把合同处理量提升 五倍 。 正将这些经验转化为企业部署路径，让财务团队能在既有工具中规模化应用 AI Agent 。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://openai.com/index/openai-pwc-finance-collaboration/","text":"https://openai.com/index/openai-pwc-finance-collaboration/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"前瞻与传闻"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"19. "},{"tag":"text","text":"消息称谷歌 Gemini 3.2 Flash 现身 iOS 应用及 AI Studio"}]]}

{"title":"# Daily AI Info (2/2)","elements":[[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
多名用户发现，模型标识为 Gemini 3.2 Flash 的模型曾现身 Gemini app iOS 端及 Google AI Studio ，但很快又消失。 有体验到该模型的用户反馈，其性能接近 Gemini 3.1 Pro 。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/Waguri_Kaoruko8/status/2051488074589167704","text":"https://x.com/Waguri_Kaoruko8/status/2051488074589167704"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"20. "},{"tag":"text","text":"传 OpenAI 首款 AI 手机 2027 上半年量产 联发科独供"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
分析师 郭明錤 透露， OpenAI 计划最早于 2027年 上半年量产首款 AI Agent 手机。 该设备预计独家采用 联发科 定制版 天玑9600 处理器。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/mingchikuo/status/2051523855286776034","text":"https://x.com/mingchikuo/status/2051523855286776034"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Paper"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"1. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Mitigating False Positives in Static Memory Safety Analysis of Rust Programs via Reinforcement Learning"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-05"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
用强化学习学习 Rust 静态内存安全分析告警的抑制策略，从 MIR 中抽取上下文特征，并结合 cargo-fuzz 动态验证可疑告警，目标是降低 Rudra/MirChecker 这类工具的误报，让开发者更信任安全扫描结果。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.04000","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.04000"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"2. "},{"tag":"text","text":"MOSAIC-Bench: Measuring Compositional Vulnerability Induction in Coding Agents"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-05"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
提出 MOSAIC-Bench，把 coding agent 的安全评测从单次提示扩展到多阶段工程任务，检查连续无害改动是否会组合成可利用漏洞，覆盖199 three-stage attack chains、10 web-application substrates、31 CWE classes；实验还比较 staged tickets 与 direct prompt，并评估 reviewer 是否会把漏洞 PR 当作常规改动放行。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03952","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03952"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"3. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Rethinking Reasoning-Intensive Retrieval: Evaluating and Advancing Retrievers in Agentic Search Systems"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-05"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
提出 BRIGHT-Pro 和 RTriever-Synth，把检索评测从单段相关性改成多方面证据组合；它同时测试静态检索和 agentic search 协议，用来判断检索器能否为复杂推理持续提供互补证据。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.04018","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.04018"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"4. "},{"tag":"text","text":"KVerus: Scalable and Resilient Formal Verification Proof Generation for Rust Code"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-05"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
这篇论文的核心贡献是：To bridge this gap, we propose a new paradigm of self-adaptive verification and present KVerus, a retrieval-augmented system for Verus-based Rust verification that can adapt to an evolving software environment."}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03822","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03822"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"5. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Multimodal Learning on Low-Quality Data with Conformal Predictive Self-Calibration"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-05"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
这篇论文的核心贡献是：In this paper, we propose a unified framework, termed Conformal Predictive Self-Calibration (CPSC), which leverages conformal prediction to equip the model with the ability to perform self-guided calibration on-the-fly."}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03820","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03820"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"6. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Natural Language Processing: A Comprehensive Practical Guide from Tokenisation to RLHF"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-05"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
这篇论文主要做的是：This preprint presents a systematic, research-oriented practicum that guides the reader through the entire modern NLP pipeline: from tokenisation and vectorisation to fine-tuning of large language models, retrieval-augmented generation, and reinforcement learning from human feedback."}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03799","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03799"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"7. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Beyond Rules: LLM-Powered Linting for Quantum Programs"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-05"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
把量子程序 linting 从人工维护规则改成 LLM+CoT/RAG 检测，让模型基于上下文识别快速变化 API、框架用法和量子程序特有错误，解决传统 rule-based linter 更新慢、覆盖窄的问题。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03943","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03943"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"8. "},{"tag":"text","text":"CC-OCR V2: Benchmarking Large Multimodal Models for Literacy in Real-world Document Processing"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-05"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
提出 CC-OCR V2，面向真实企业文档处理重新设计 OCR/LMM 评测，覆盖 OCR、版面理解、表格图表读取和复杂文档读写等硬场景，强调以实际业务文档里的 corner cases 检验模型能力。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03903","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03903"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"9. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Agentic-imodels: Evolving agentic interpretability tools via autoresearch"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-05"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
这篇论文的核心贡献是：To address this, we introduce Agentic-imodels, an agentic autoresearch loop that evolves data-science tools designed to be interpretable by agents."}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03808","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03808"}]]}
